issues.title: No year-over-year comparison view
issues.description: The 'YoY Change' KPI shows a single number (0.0%) but there is no chart comparing 2024 vs 2025 data side by side. A journalist needs this for trend stories.
issues.expected: A chart overlaying 2024 and 2025 data on the same axis
issues.actual: Only a single percentage number; no comparison visualization

issues.title: No anomaly or spike detection
issues.description: The timeseries chart shows daily data but there is no indication of unusual spikes or anomalies. A journalist needs this to find story leads.
issues.expected: Red dots or markers on unusual spikes; tooltip explaining 'X% above average'
issues.actual: No anomaly detection or visual indicators

issues.title: No time period quick-select
issues.description: A journalist needs to quickly jump to 'Last 30 days', 'This year', 'Since 2024'. Currently only custom date pickers are available.
reproduction_steps: Look for quick-select buttons like 'Last 30 days'
issues.expected: Buttons or dropdown for common time periods
issues.actual: Only custom date pickers in sidebar

issues.title: No shareable link with current filters
issues.description: A journalist wants to share a specific filtered view with a colleague. The URL does not update when filters change.
issues.actual: URL does not reflect filter state

summary: Dashboard shows data but lacks YoY comparison, anomaly detection, and shareable links needed for investigative journalism.
